transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if physical therapy at Riverbend Rehab is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can check that for you. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Ortiz, born March 4th, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see you're on the Horizon Silver PPO plan. Let me look up Riverbend Rehab's network status.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good news — Riverbend Rehab is in-network under your plan, and outpatient physical therapy is covered with a $30 copay per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh great, that's a relief. Is there a limit on how many visits are covered?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, your plan allows up to 20 physical therapy visits per calendar year.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That should be plenty. Thanks so much for checking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Daniel. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
